name: Open C superclass
definition: Any open C-family profile; classifier-only rollup

name: Open C lipped
definition: Folded C with one stiffening lip fold per flange

name: Open C unlipped
definition: Folded plain C with uniform thickness and no lips

definition: Folded C with return (second-fold) lips

name: I-shape wide/parallel flange

name: I-shape taper flange
definition: Filleted I with sloped inner flange faces

name: Angle
definition: Two-leg L equal or unequal (by parameters)

name: Tee
definition: T-profile including split tees

name: Hollow structural superclass
definition: Any closed single-cell hollow; classifier-only rollup

name: Rectangular hollow
definition: Closed rectangular single-cell hollow

name: Square hollow
definition: Closed square single-cell hollow

name: Plate / flat

definition: Reserved pending demand

definition: Reserved pending demand

name: Z superclass
definition: Any Z-family profile; classifier-only rollup

definition: Closed/semi-closed roll-formed beam profile with integral step ledge

definition: Closed multi-piece interlocked/seamed rectangular beam profile
